summary: Projection-dispatch evidence for native_batch c=4 Qwen/PARO projection selection. This accepts only projection-dispatch metadata; it is not a retained c>N throughput claim.

commands.row_gemv_baseline: env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 4 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c4-profiler-preflight/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --batch-decode-linear-projection-path selected_c1 --batch-sample-mode batched_lm_head --batch-sample-eq-ok --batch-sample-eq-artifact benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-c4-native-batch-sampler-equality.json --batch-sample-eq-rows 4 --json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c4-projection-dispatch-evidence/row-gemv-baseline-c4.json

validation.native_candidate_reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; primitive c>N correctness gate did not pass: no primitive correctness artifact path provided; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; execution.batch_execution.blockers must be empty; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.path must be benchmark_accepted_caware_projection; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.selected_candidate must not be row_gemv; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.throughput_claim_eligible must be true; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.blockers must be empty; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.selection.variant must not be row_gemv; execution.batch_execution.projection_dispatch.evidence is missing; projection_dispatch_candidates must include selected projection candidate; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits

notes: Row-GEMV baseline is the explicit selected_c1 projection diagnostic with the same c=4 512/128 workload and batched sampler equality gate.
This artifact is consumed only by --projection-dispatch-artifact to prove a non-row-GEMV projection-dispatch candidate exists for c=4.
No retained performance claim is made by this projection-only artifact.
